source_pr.title: ut: support test.short for ut
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #45386

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The PR is a unit-test infrastructure change (support `test.short` and running tests under the race flag); no concrete flaky failure signature is captured in the case.
failure_signature: No concrete failure signature captured (test infra change for `test.short` / race).
root_cause_explanation: This change is about test execution configuration (supporting `test.short` and adjusting tests for race runs) rather than a documented fix for a specific flaky symptom. Without a concrete flaky signature and a targeted stabilization tied to that flakiness, classify as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Adjust unit test infra to support `test.short`/race runs; no clearly evidenced targeted flaky stabilization change in the case.

evidence: files: executor/test/unstabletest/BUILD.bazel, executor/test/unstabletest/memory_test.go, executor/test/unstabletest/unstable_test.go, server/BUILD.bazel, server/conn_test.go, testkit/BUILD.bazel, testkit/skip.go, tools/check/ut.go, util/skip/BUILD.bazel, util/skip/skip.go
